title: HitColor Mod - NEW
description: HitColor Mod is a lightweight Minecraft Fabric mod that lets you customize or remove hit effect colors for a cleaner, smoother combat experience.
body:
## HitColor:
Customize your combat visuals like never before!
This update lets you change the color of hit effects - or completely remove them for a cleaner experience. Perfect for PvP or anyone who prefers a minimalist look.

Made for my yt: https://www.youtube.com/@lluurii11
## Videos with mod:
